'''鈭歽-th-h''' ('''kayathah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quibble|quibble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quibble|quibble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-th-h
|-
! Lemma
| kayathah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyathah|thiyathah]] || [[word:jiyathah|jiyathah]] || [[word:shiyathah|shiyathah]] || [[word:kiyathah|kiyathah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyathah|thuthuyathah]] || [[word:jujuyathah|jujuyathah]] || [[word:shushuyathah|shushuyathah]] || [[word:kukuyathah|kukuyathah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyathah|thuyathah]] || [[word:juyathah|juyathah]] || [[word:shuyathah|shuyathah]] || [[word:kuyathah|kuyathah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyathah|thuyathah]] || [[word:juyathah|juyathah]] || [[word:shuyathah|shuyathah]] || [[word:kuyathah|kuyathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyathah|theyathah]] || [[word:jeyathah|jeyathah]] || [[word:sheyathah|sheyathah]] || [[word:keyathah|keyathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyathah|thothoyathah]] || [[word:jojoyathah|jojoyathah]] || [[word:shoshoyathah|shoshoyathah]] || [[word:kokoyathah|kokoyathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyathah|thoyathah]] || [[word:joyathah|joyathah]] || [[word:shoyathah|shoyathah]] || [[word:koyathah|koyathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyathah|thoyathah]] || [[word:joyathah|joyathah]] || [[word:shoyathah|shoyathah]] || [[word:koyathah|koyathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yathah|th忙yathah]] || [[word:j忙yathah|j忙yathah]] || [[word:sh忙yathah|sh忙yathah]] || [[word:k忙yathah|k忙yathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayathah|thathayathah]] || [[word:jajayathah|jajayathah]] || [[word:shashayathah|shashayathah]] || [[word:kakayathah|kakayathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayathah|thayathah]] || [[word:jayathah|jayathah]] || [[word:shayathah|shayathah]] || [[word:kayathah|kayathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayathah|thayathah]] || [[word:jayathah|jayathah]] || [[word:shayathah|shayathah]] || [[word:kayathah|kayathah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayathah|shayathah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayathah|goshayathah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayathah|gokishayathah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayathahn眉|shayathahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayathahnkn眉|goshayathahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayathahn眉|gokishayathahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayathahsh毛|shayathahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayathahnksh毛|goshayathahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayathahsh毛|gokishayathahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayathahro|shayathahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayathahnkro|goshayathahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayathahro|gokishayathahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayathahmu|shayathahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayathahnkmu|goshayathahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayathahmu|gokishayathahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayathahsher|shayathahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayathahnksher|goshayathahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayathahsher|gokishayathahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayathahng|shayathahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayathahnkng|goshayathahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayathahng|gokishayathahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayathahya|shayathahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayathahnkya|goshayathahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayathahya|gokishayathahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayathahyam|shayathahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayathahnkyam|goshayathahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayathahyam|gokishayathahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayathahn眉sh毛|shayathahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayathahnkn眉sh毛|goshayathahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayathahn眉sh毛|gokishayathahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayathahn眉ro|shayathahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayathahnkn眉ro|goshayathahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayathahn眉ro|gokishayathahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayathahn眉mu|shayathahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayathahnkn眉mu|goshayathahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayathahn眉mu|gokishayathahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayathahsh毛n眉|shayathahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayathahnksh毛n眉|goshayathahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayathahsh毛n眉|gokishayathahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayathahsh毛ro|shayathahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayathahnksh毛ro|goshayathahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayathahsh毛ro|gokishayathahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayathahsh毛mu|shayathahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayathahnksh毛mu|goshayathahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayathahsh毛mu|gokishayathahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayathahron眉|shayathahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayathahnkron眉|goshayathahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayathahron眉|gokishayathahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayathahrosh毛|shayathahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayathahnkrosh毛|goshayathahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayathahrosh毛|gokishayathahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayathahromu|shayathahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayathahnkromu|goshayathahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayathahromu|gokishayathahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayathahmun眉|shayathahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayathahnkmun眉|goshayathahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayathahmun眉|gokishayathahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayathahmush毛|shayathahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayathahnkmush毛|goshayathahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayathahmush毛|gokishayathahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayathahmuro|shayathahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayathahnkmuro|goshayathahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayathahmuro|gokishayathahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
